creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
For empty input, mandoc produce 3 lines output with brackets:

$ mandoc < /dev/null | wc -l
       3


$ mandoc < /dev/null        
()                                                                          ()

                                                                            ()


this looks strange.

GNU groff works fine: 
$ nroff -mandoc  < /dev/null  | wc -l
       0
